what_was_done: Fixed MCP server crash from ChromaDB embedding conflict (added _get_col() fallback + null guard). Deferred _ensure_initialized() to lazy first-tool-call so MCP handshake completes in 2s vs 25s. Added _ensure_initialized() to all 6 @mcp.tool() functions. Completed full embedding migration: 5924 docs re-embedded from all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim) to nomic-embed-text-v2-moe (768-dim, 8192 tokens). Tests: 1307/1307 passing.
